name: Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb eggplant, peeled and cut into 1/4 inch thick rounds
2 boxes (10 oz each) frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed dry
1/2 package (16 oz) lasagna noodles, cooked, drained, and cooled
16 oz mozzarella cheese, cut crosswise into 15 slices.
recipeInstructions:
1 Coat a non-stick skillet with Pam cooking spray. Cook eggplant in batches over medium heat, turning after 4 minutes per side, until golden and tender.
2 In a large bowl, mix spinach, ricotta cheese, cottage cheese, 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, and eggs until well blended.
3 Spread 1 cup spaghetti sauce evenly over the bottom of the baking dish. Place 3 noodles lengthwise on top. Cover with half the spinach mixture, then half the eggplant rounds, and 5 slices mozzarella cheese.
4 Repeat layers with remaining ingredients: second layer of noodles (overlapping to cover), remaining sauce, and mozzarella cheese.
5 Sprinkle remaining 2 tbsp Parmesan cheese on top.
6 Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 1 hour until bubbling and lightly browned around edges. Let stand 15 minutes before cutting into 12 pieces.
Makes: 2 servings
Nutritional Analysis:
389 calories
18 grams fat
101 grams cholesterol
